<?php use App\Models\User; use Livewire\Volt\Volt; test('login screen can be rendered', function () { $response = $this->get('/login'); $response ->assertOk() ->assertSeeVolt('pages.auth.login'); }); test('users can authenticate using the login screen', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $component = Volt::test('pages.auth.login') ->set('form.email', $user->email) ->set('form.password', 'password'); $component->call('login'); $component ->assertHasNoErrors() ->assertRedirect(route('dashboard', absolute: false)); $this->assertAuthenticated(); }); test('users can not authenticate with invalid password', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $component = Volt::test('pages.auth.login') ->set('form.email', $user->email) ->set('form.password', 'wrong-password'); $component->call('login'); $component ->assertHasErrors() ->assertNoRedirect(); $this->assertGuest(); }); test('navigation menu can be rendered', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $this->actingAs($user); $response = $this->get('/dashboard'); $response ->assertOk() ->assertSeeVolt('layout.navigation'); }); test('users can logout', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $this->actingAs($user); $component = Volt::test('layout.navigation'); $component->call('logout'); $component ->assertHasNoErrors() ->assertRedirect('/'); $this->assertGuest(); });
